connectors.name: +V
connectors.description: Connect to the positive rail of the power supply in your circuit

connectors.name: Serial In
connectors.description: Connect to the 22K resistor of the PICAXE download circuit

connectors.name: In 4 / ADC 4
connectors.description: This pin can be used as a digital input or can be used as an analogue input

connectors.name: In 3 / Infrain
connectors.description: This pin can be used as a digital input. The output from an Infra-Red Receiver can be connected to this pin

connectors.name: In 2
connectors.description: This pin can be used as a digital input

connectors.name: In 1
connectors.description: This pin can be used as a digital input

connectors.name: In 0 / ADC 0
connectors.description: This pin can be used as a digital input or can be used as an analogue input

connectors.name: Out 5
connectors.description: This pin can be used as a digital output

connectors.name: Out 4
connectors.description: This pin can be used as a digital output

connectors.name: Out 3
connectors.description: This pin can be used as a digital output

connectors.name: Out 2
connectors.description: This pin can be used as a digital output

connectors.name: Out 1
connectors.description: This pin can be used as a digital output

connectors.name: Serial Out / Out 0 / Infraout
connectors.description: Connect to the output pin of the download connector for the PICAXE download circuit. This pin can be used as a digital output and can be used to drive an Infra-Red LED

connectors.name: 0V
connectors.description: Connect to the 0V (ground) of the power supply in your circuit
